title: Wholesome Venezuelan Walnuts Gratin
description: A creamy, cheese-pull Venezuelan gratin featuring toasted walnuts, perfect for pescatarian diners.

ingredients.name: grated cheese
ingredients.notes: queso de mano or mild cheese

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and grease a small baking dish.
In a mortar, pound toasted walnuts with a pinch of salt until coarsely crushed.
In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Stir in flour and paprika, cooking for 1 minute to make a roux.
Gradually whisk in milk, stirring until thickened, then remove from heat.
Beat the egg in a bowl, then fold into the sauce, adding grated cheese and crushed walnuts.
Season the mixture with salt, pepper, and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
Bake for 20 minutes until the top is golden and the cheese pulls together.
Let cool slightly, garnish with parsley, slice, and serve warm.
